'''âk-l-ng-n''' ('''kakalngenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chalken|chalken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chalken|chalken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-l-ng-n
|-
! Lemma
| kakalngenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikalngenoko|thikalngenoko]] || [[word:jikalngenoko|jikalngenoko]] || [[word:shikalngenoko|shikalngenoko]] || [[word:kikalngenoko|kikalngenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
